title: Turtle Scute Recipe
description: Now you can craft your own turtle scute
body:
🐢 Turtle Scute Recipe Datapack  
Reclaim the shell—no hatchling waiting required!  
This datapack introduces a reverse recipe for Turtle Scutes, letting you convert Armadillo Scutes back into turtle gear with a splash of dye.

✨ Features  
✅ Shapeless recipe using 1 Armadillo Scute + 1 Green Dye → yields 1 Turtle Scute  
🧩 Lore-friendly integration with dye mechanics and mob-based progression  
🔁 Modular JSON structure for easy editing and expansion  
🛠️ Compatible with Minecraft 1.21+
